title: Left Behind
body:
**Left Behind** introduces Scps in Minecraft world ![All](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d70f19c23ee699e3ad7e1a6ffd348fce61a9e6cf.png)

![Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b8083d5abdc28d532473311a0b0a076955f8475.png) You can aquire music disc by killing siren head


You can buy Scp 1048 plushie through Scp 1879 If you give Totem to plushie, it will be alive It will mine iron ore to build SCP-1048-A and will hit you to build SCP-1048-C


You can find Scp 096, Scp 682, Scp 1093, Scp 999 by finding Scp_Container structure That's it for now! Please look forward to it!

Discord: [https://discord.gg/QgRY9wRJ5m](https://discord.gg/QgRY9wRJ5m)
